data.title: IntouchCX's IntouchAI recognized as Major Contender in Everest Group’s 2025 PEAK Matrix® Assessment for AI Agents in CXM.
data.description: IntouchCX, a renowned company in customer experience management and automation, has revealed that its sector-specific technology segment, IntouchAI, has received recognition as a Major Contender in the Everest Group Conversational AI and AI Agents in CXM Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025. This acknowledgment underscores IntouchAI's advanced technology expertise, robust architecture, and proficient implementation of Conversational AI and AI Agents on a large scale within customer and agent interactions.

data.title: TikTok users reveal unredacted Epstein files, sparking concerns over digital security and spreading misinformation.
data.description: There has been a surge in online investigations regarding purported errors in redacted materials from the Department of Justice, bringing to light concerns about cybersecurity and the spread of false information. This has garnered significant attention on social media platforms, with users scrutinizing the revealed information. The incident underscores the importance of ensuring secure digital processes and combating the rapid dissemination of inaccurate content.

data.title: Chill-N Nitrogen Ice Cream sees successful 2025 with improved sales and fan base in MIAMI.
data.description: In Miami, Chill-N Nitrogen Ice Cream had a successful year, seeing a rise in sales and implementing smart technology enhancements while deepening engagement with its customer base. The Miami-based nitrogen-frozen ice cream brand experienced growth throughout the year, with a strong connection to its fans. The company reported increased sales numbers and the incorporation of new technological upgrades. Chill-N Nitrogen Ice Cream continues to thrive in its mission of providing made-to-order frozen treats, solidifying its presence in the market.

data.title: Discover 7 overlooked games of 2025 worthy of your attention amid a competitive release lineup. #gaming #hidden
data.description: This year saw a plethora of new game releases, with many standout titles being overshadowed by the crowded market. Despite this, we have compiled a list of hidden gems that have largely gone unnoticed but are deserving of your attention. These games offer a fresh and unique experience amidst the saturated gaming landscape, with a diverse selection to cater to different tastes and preferences. From thrilling indie adventures to immersive multiplayer experiences, these hidden gems provide a welcome alternative to the mainstream titles dominating the market. Don't miss out on these overlooked treasures, as they offer a chance to discover something special in a sea of releases.

data.title: SEGG Media's partnership with Super League Kerala sees 150M viewers from 33 matches, paving the way for expanded Season 3 plans.
data.description: SEGG Media Corporation, a global sports, entertainment, and gaming group, has reported on the success of its partnership with Super League Kerala, the professional franchise football league in Kerala, India. The final match of the championship tournament of the league's second season took place on December 19. Through Sports.com, the Company live-streamed 33 matches of Super League Kerala over a 77-day period. This streaming reached over 150 million viewers through the Company's new app, website, and social channels. The results exceeded expectations, confirming the success of the product and setting the stage for Sports.com's expanded live-streaming plans for Season 3 in 2026.

data.title: Lemon Slice gets $10.5M in funding, introduces interactive avatars. Pioneer AI tech turns photo into video.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development from Lemon Slice, an innovative AI model has been introduced that can convert a solitary image into an engaging video with interactive capabilities. This cutting-edge technology marks a significant advancement in the field of artificial intelligence. Lemon Slice, a pioneering AI research and product laboratory based in San Francisco, unveiled this unique model on December 23, 2025. By harnessing this state-of-the-art AI, individuals or businesses now have the ability to transform a static photo into a dynamic, conversational video experience. This transformative technology opens up new possibilities for creative expression and user engagement in the digital realm. Lemon Slice's initiative is at the forefront of reshaping how content is presented and experienced in the evolving landscape of interactive media.

data.title: Developed market sovereign debt is no longer considered a safe haven due to increased governance risks; DoubleLine report shared in Tampa, FL.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, as of December 23, 2025, the sovereign debt of developed market (DM) nations, historically considered secure from governance and societal risks seen in emerging markets (EM), is no longer guaranteed safe. The DoubleLine Global Bond Portfolio has highlighted this shift, signaling that DM countries are now vulnerable to potential financial instabilities.

data.title: Tigerlily Foundation introduces RACE Alliance, focusing on breast cancer education and care. Launch date: Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Tigerlily Foundation unveiled the RACE ALLIANCE, a new initiative called the Rallying Around Community and Equity Alliance. This program aims to enhance understanding and knowledge of breast cancer education and care. The initiative is set to bring together a wide range of expertise and increase awareness on these important issues.

data.title: Santa Claus Rally favors certain stocks historically. S&P 500 rises an average 0.95% in the last trading week of Dec.
data.description: As we head into the final trading week of the year, the question on Wall Street is whether the Santa Claus Rally will make an appearance once again. Newmont stock is currently trading close to its recent highs, prompting traders to keep a close eye on NEM. Historical data suggests positive outcomes, with the U.S. stock market historically experiencing steady growth during the period from December 23 to December 31.According to Seasonax data, over 95 years of history, the S&P 500 has seen an average increase of 0.95% during the last trading week of the year. The index has ended this week higher in 69 instances, resulting in a 71% success rate. The most substantial Santa Claus Rally for the S&P 500 was observed in 2018 when it surged by 6.28% between December 24 and December 31.The Dow Jones Industrial Average has shown even stronger seasonal performance, with 128 years of data indicating an average gain of 1.06% in the final trading week of the year. The Dow has concluded this week on a positive note 92 times, leading to a 77% success rate. The Dow's most robust...For more information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. completes registration of share capital decrease and increase.
data.description: Portuguese commercial bank, Banco Comercial Português, S.A., has successfully completed the registration process for both a decrease and an increase in its share capital. This regulatory move will see the bank's financial structure adjust accordingly. The exact figures for the share capital changes have not been disclosed publicly.

data.title: AerCap delivers 1 of 10 new Airbus A321neo aircraft to Thai Airways. 9 more to follow for THAI.
data.description: AerCap Holdings N.V. ("AerCap" or the "Company") has recently completed the delivery of the initial Airbus A321neo aircraft out of a total order of ten to Thai Airways International Public Company Limited ("THAI"). The outstanding nine planes are set to be handed over to the airline in the near future. This transaction marks a significant milestone for AerCap as it strengthens its partnership with THAI.
